episodes.title: The Fear of Speaking Out
episodes.description:
One of the biggest fears after leaving a high-control religion:
Your family still inside seeing you speak out. Because to them, speaking about the system is a form of betrayal. 

This isn’t about attacking anyone personally, or wanting to hurt anyone.

It’s about reaching the people who are outside those walls and feel completely alone. 

Silence helps no one who is struggling. 

If this resonates, know that you’re not alone. 

#exJW #cultsurvivor #religioustrauma #exjwstories #healingthroughstory #igotout #riseanyway #nervoussystem #subconscious #attachmentstyles #mentalhealth

episodes.title: Letting Yourself Feel… So You Can Let Go
episodes.description:
Emotions that are suppressed don't disappear. Having a safe space to unpack those emotions helps greatly. 

So does a bonfire. 🔥 😉 

#cultsurvivor  #exjehovahswitness  #religioustraumahealing  
#exJW #cultsurvivor #religioustrauma #exjwstories #healingthroughstory #igotout #weriseanyway #nervoussystem #subconscious #attachmentstyles

episodes.title: The Untold Anger After Leaving a Cult | Part 1
episodes.description:
Leaving the Jehovah’s Witnesses came with deep grief, years of loss, confusion… and a lot of anger. 

But when you’re taught to not feel real human emotions, you might be out of sorts with how to process them. 

Tomorrow I’ll share Part 2 |  Learning To Feel & Let Go.

#exJW #cultsurvivor  #religioustraumahealing  #exjwstories  #healingthroughstory  #igotout  #riseanyway #nervoussystemregulation  #subconscious #attachmentstyles #exjehovahswitness

episodes.title: The Dream That Showed Me The Way Out
episodes.description:
Seven years ago, a dream told me what my mind couldn't admit yet. 

What if you chose the unfamiliar peace over the familiar chaos? Your nervous system was wired for survival. But you can rewire it for calm. 

The calm is waiting. 

#exjw  #cultsurvivor  #religioustraumahealing  #exjwstories  #healingthroughstory  #igotout  #riseanyway #nervoussystemregulation  #subconscious #attachmentstyles #exjehovahswitness

episodes.title: What Shunning Does to The Nervous System
episodes.description:
Your nervous system still runs on ancient wiring: 
Tribe = safety. 
Shunned = death.

So when you're cut off from everyone you've ever known — your body doesn't just feel "sad". It registers a survival threat.

The intensity of your pain isn't weakness.

It's proof you were wired for love and connection. 

You weren't "too sensitive." 
You were biologically betrayed.

And what was wired by being ostracized, can be rewired.

We are rising anyway 🔥 

#exjehovahswitness #religioustrauma #exjw #attachmenthealing
#exJW #cultsurvivor #religioustrauma #exjwstories #healingthroughstory #igotout #weriseanyway #nervoussystem #subconscious #attachmentstyles

episodes.title: There's Wisdom in Knowing When to Slow Down
episodes.description:
Day 12 of 30. 

We celebrate the grind. 
The hustle. 
The people who built empires on sleepless nights and relentless ambition. 

And that's all immensely commendable. 

But what if you're not just running toward something — building while also doing the deep work. 
Shadow work. 
Attachment healing. 
Rewiring decades of cult conditioning.

Your nervous system will let you know when it's fried 🧠 🍳 

Rewiring isn't just about pushing through fear. 
It's also about recognizing what's sustainable — and what's not.

After this challenge, I'm slowing down 😉 
Posting once a week instead. 
Because there's wisdom in that too.

18 more days. 
Exhausted yet still here.

Rise Anyway 🔥

#standaretopost 

#nervousystemhealing #shadowwork #exjehovahswitness 
#exJW #cultsurvivor #religioustrauma #exjwstories #healingthroughstory #igotout #weriseanyway #nervoussystem #subconscious #attachmentstyles

episodes.title: The Cult Taught My Nervous System Money Was Evil
episodes.description:
I was taught "money was the root of all evil." 
That it was a distraction. 
"The end is near — why plan for retirement?" 

So I didn't save. 
Didn't plan. 
Didn't pursue a good paying career.

And then I left — and realized I had to build a life with beliefs that were still running in the background.

"I'm not smart enough." 
"Wanting more makes me greedy." 
"Who am I to charge for this?"

Sound familiar?

The conscious mind can't outwill the subconscious. 

But we CAN reprogram it — the same way it got programmed in the first place.

Repetition. 
Emotion. 
Over and over. 
Until it finally believes you.

#exJW #cultsurvivor #religioustrauma #exjwstories #healingthroughstory #igotout #riseanyway #nervoussystem #subconscious #attachmentstyles

episodes.title: A Cult Taught My Body to be in Survival Mode
episodes.description:
The religious cult taught my body to survive. 
Now I'm teaching it to live.

We can't force ourselves to "get over it", but we can create safety in our body until trust becomes the default instead of fear.

If you've ever been stuck in survival mode wondering if it ever gets better - it does. 

Not perfectly, but freer. 

#exjehovahswitness #religioustrauma #attachmenthealing #exjw
#exJW #cultsurvivor #religioustraumahealing #exjwstories #healingthroughstory #igotout #riseanyway #nervoussystem #subconscious #attachmentstyles

episodes.title: What A Cult Did To My Attachment Style
episodes.description:
When love is conditional and fear-based, your nervous system adapts.

You learn:
• Hypervigilance
• “It’s my fault” thinking
• Fear of punishment
• Fear of abandonment
• Shrinking to survive

Your body doesn’t forget that.

That wiring can show up as:
Anxious attachment.
Avoidant attachment.
Fearful/disorganized attachment.

The first step is leaving the high controlling system.

The second step is rewiring your nervous system. 

#attachmenthealing  #exjehovahswitness  #nervoussystem  #religioustraumahealing 
#exJW #cultsurvivor #religioustrauma #exjwstories #healingthroughstory #igotout  #riseanyway #subconscious #attachmentstyles

episodes.title: What Cult Fear Conditioning Taught My Nervous System
episodes.description:
When fear is framed as protection, a child’s nervous system doesn’t learn safety —it learns to scan.

And when that readiness lasts long enough, it starts to feel normal.
And you bring it all the way into adulthood. 

This isn’t religious hate. It’s fear based conditioning and nervous system education.

Part 2: What my body learned about power, agency, and identity.

#exJW #cultsurvivor #religioustraumahealing #igotout #exjehovahswitness  #exjwstories  #healingthroughstory  #podcast #riseanyway #nervoussystemregulation  #subconsciousreprogramming  #attachmentstyles #personaldevelopment #personaldevelopmentcourse

episodes.title: Leaving A Cult Doesn't Mean I Don't Mourn Their Loss
episodes.description:
I left because my body knew before my mind caught up. But I never stopped caring for the deeper friendships & connections I had. 

Their nervous system thinks I abandoned them. Why? Based off their subconscious programming that if we leave the organization = that equals we left them. 

The system frames departure as betrayal, not self-preservation. 

To them, we are the enemy. 

To us, they are still stuck in the same system that once held my mind+body hostage too. 

But freedom has no deadline. And neither does my door 💜 

Let's connect for collaborative projects, motivational speaking or interviews. 

#exJW #cultsurvivor #religioustraumahealing #igotout #exjehovahswitness  #exjwstories #healingthroughstory #igotout #rewireyourbrain #riseanyway  #nervoussystemregulation #subconscious #attachmentstyles  #lgbtqiapluscommunity #lgbt #personaldevelopment #personaldevelopmentcourse #iatools

episodes.title: What I Gained Leaving A Cult
episodes.description:
When you leave a high-control religion, everyone tells you what you'll lose.

Nobody talks about what you might find on the other side.

If you're walking this path — or thinking about it — I hope this helps.

🔥 Rise Anyway

#exJW #cultsurvivor #religioustrauma #exjwstories #healingthroughstory #igotout #weriseanyway #nervoussystem #subconscious #attachmentstyles #lgbt #lgbtqiapluscommunity

episodes.title: What Leaving A Cult Did To My Nervous System
episodes.description:
7 years ago, I lost everyone I loved in one day.

That's why I do this work. That's why attachment styles and subconscious rewiring aren't just topics for me — they're survival tools.

More people are waking up to the invisible conditioning that shaped them. If that's you, you're in the right place.

🔥 Rise Anyway

#30daychallenge 

#exJW #cultsurvivor #igotout #religioustraumahealing #exjwstories #exjehovahswitness  #healingthroughstory #igotout #weriseanyway #nervoussystemregulation  #subconsciousreprogramming #attachmentstyles #personaldevelopment #personaldevelopmentcourse #iatools

episodes.title: The Cult Wrapped Fear In A Bow
episodes.description:
Turns out my brain learned a few tricks from growing up in a high-control religion. 

Wrap fear in something that sounds reasonable.

Call control "protection."

Call avoidance "rest."

*chefs kiss manipulation*

Rewiring isn't about burning out. It's about teaching your nervous system you can survive something new. 

If this resonates, subscribe and let's rewire these old fear based beliefs together. 

#exJW #cultsurvivor #religioustraumahealing #exjehovahswitness  #exjwstories #healingthroughstory #weriseanyway #riseanyway #subconsciousmind #subconsciousreprogramming #healingthroughstory #personaldevelopment #personaldevelopmentcourse #nervoussystem #rewireyourbrain #rewirethinking #attachmentstyles

episodes.title: My Brain Thinks Instagram Is A Bear 🐻
episodes.description:
Have you ever done something brave... and then immediately second guessed yourself? 

Growth feels like danger to your nervous system. 

Your subconscious can't tell the difference between fear and growth. 

Day 2 of #30daychallenge

episodes.title: Cult Survivor Rewiring Subconscious Fear in 30 Days (Watch Me Do It)
episodes.description:
Day 1 of a 30 Day Challenge:

For years, I carried beliefs, fears, and patterns I didn't even know were running me. Talk therapy helped — but it only went so far. That's when I discovered the truth: 95-97% of our beliefs, emotional patterns, and behaviors are stored in the subconscious mind. And if you want real change? You have to go deeper.

This is Day 1 of a 30-day experiment where I'm rewiring one of my subconscious fears — being on camera. 😬

I'm not just teaching this. I'm living it. Watch me do the work, stumble through it, and (hopefully) come out the other side transformed.

If you've ever felt stuck in patterns you can't explain — this series is for you.

🔥 Follow the journey:

Instagram: @theriseanywayproject
